instruction: My audio is too quiet and sometimes muted. Please configure the default output sink so that volume is exactly 100%, mute is off, and then save the active sink name into /home/user/Desktop/audio_status/active_sink.txt.

command: import pyautogui; import time; pyautogui.click({SCREEN_WIDTH_HALF}, {SCREEN_HEIGHT_HALF}); time.sleep(0.5);

result.command: pulseaudio --start >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; sink=$(pactl get-default-sink 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$sink" ] || sink=$(pactl list short sinks 2>/dev/null | head -n1 | awk '{print $2}'); vol=$(pactl get-sink-volume "$sink" 2>/dev/null | head -n1 | awk '{print $5}' | sed 's/%//'); mute=$(pactl get-sink-mute "$sink" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}'); ok=1; [ "$vol" = "100" ] || ok=0; [ "$mute" = "no" ] || ok=0; [ -f /home/user/Desktop/audio_status/active_sink.txt ] || ok=0; [ "$(cat /home/user/Desktop/audio_status/active_sink.txt 2>/dev/null)" = "$sink" ] || ok=0; if [ "$ok" = "1" ]; then echo PASS; else echo FAIL; fi
